movie.synopsis: Im Not Afraid I’m Not Afraid AKA No tengo miedo : In 1986 Veracruz, a ten-year-old finds another child trapped in a hole near his house. The story examines poverty, childhood innocence, and family secrets during the World Cup, including Maradona’s “Hand of God” goal.
